code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

let s = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(s)
mut a = 0
mut bv = 0
mut st = 0
mut which = 0
mut i = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false

while i < n
  let c = match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  if is_ws(c)
    if in_num
      let val = cur * sign
      if which == 0
        a = val
      else if which == 1
        bv = val
      else
        st = val
      end
      which = which + 1
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      in_num = false
    end
  else if c == 45
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if c == 43
    in_num = true
  else
    cur = cur * 10 + (c - 48)
    in_num = true
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let val = cur * sign
  if which == 0
    a = val
  else if which == 1
    bv = val
  else
    st = val
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut v = a
mut first = true
while v < bv
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
  v = v + st
end
println(out)
